data.title: Update CLAUDE.md with architect-foundation Quick Reference row and Architecture paragraph
data.description:
## What
Add architect-foundation documentation to CLAUDE.md: a new Quick Reference table row and a new Architecture paragraph.

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (modify Quick Reference table, add Architecture paragraph)

## TDD Requirement
testing_mode: exemption (criterion 3 — static documentation file, no executable assertion possible)

## Implementation

### 1. Quick Reference Table — Add New Row
Find the Quick Reference table (starts around line 14 with '| Run primary tickets end-to-end | /dso:sprint |').
Find the row for 'Epic decomposition into stories' (/dso:preplanning).
INSERT a new row AFTER the preplanning row:

| Generate architectural scaffolding for an existing project | /dso:architect-foundation or /dso:architect-foundation --auto (--auto skips Socratic dialogue, uses recommended defaults) |

### 2. Architecture Section — Add Paragraph
Find the line in the Architecture section that ends with 'Graceful degradation: if Semgrep is not installed, gate disables rather than blocks. Timeout budget: 15 seconds.'
INSERT a new paragraph AFTER that sentence (after 'Timeout budget: 15 seconds.'):

**architect-foundation guided mode** (/dso:architect-foundation): Reads project-understanding.md to generate enforcement artifacts (ARCH_ENFORCEMENT.md, docs/adr/). Key behaviors: --auto flag skips Phase 1 Socratic dialogue and selects recommended defaults; Phase 2.75 batches all artifact confirmations into a single user prompt instead of per-file confirmations; Phase 2.8 always generates ADRs for session decisions without asking; Phase 2.9 re-run idempotency uses append-only merge so existing enforcement rules are never overwritten.

## Verification
Run: grep -q 'architect-foundation' CLAUDE.md && echo PASS
Run: grep -qE '\-\-auto.*skips' CLAUDE.md && echo PASS
Run: grep -q 'append-only' CLAUDE.md && echo PASS
